name: aws-bedrock-cost
description: Bedrock コストガードゲートウェイ — OpenAI互換APIでBedrockをBearer認証+月次コスト上限つきで提供する

scripts.synth: npm run build && npm run -w @bedrock-gw/infra synth
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run -w @bedrock-gw/infra deploy
scripts.diff: npm run build && npm run -w @bedrock-gw/infra diff
